summary: Iteration 33: Verified mobile catalog download fix. Both CatalogFormGate.jsx and BalieCatalogGate.jsx now use window.location.href instead of window.open/link.click() to avoid popup blocking on mobile browsers. Backend endpoints /api/catalog/download and /api/balia-catalog/download return PDF with Content-Disposition: attachment header. All 5 backend tests passed. Frontend mobile viewport tests (375x812) confirmed both /sauny and /balie pages load correctly and catalog forms display properly.
critical_code_review_comments: CatalogFormGate.jsx (line 31): Correctly uses window.location.href instead of window.open() - fix for mobile popup blocking
BalieCatalogGate.jsx (line 26): Correctly uses window.location.href instead of link.click() - fix for mobile popup blocking
Backend /api/catalog/download: Returns Content-Type: application/pdf with Content-Disposition: attachment header
Backend /api/balia-catalog/download: Returns Content-Type: application/pdf with Content-Disposition: attachment header
Both forms have proper data-testid attributes for testing (catalog-gate-name, catalog-gate-phone, catalog-gate-email, catalog-gate-submit)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile catalog download fix verified. CatalogFormGate.jsx and BalieCatalogGate.jsx now use window.location.href for downloads instead of window.open/link.click which were blocked by mobile browsers in async callbacks. Backend returns PDF with Content-Disposition: attachment header which triggers browser download. Catalog PDFs exist in preview environment (both return 200).

catalog_form_gate_mobile_viewport.details: /sauny page loads on mobile (375x812), 'Pobierz katalog' button visible, form modal opens with all fields (Imię, Telefon, Email)

balie_catalog_gate_mobile_viewport.details: /balie page loads on mobile (375x812), 'Pobierz katalog PDF' button visible, BalieCatalogGate modal opens with all fields

backend_catalog_download_endpoint.details: GET /api/catalog/download returns 200 with Content-Type: application/pdf and Content-Disposition: attachment

backend_balia_catalog_download_endpoint.details: GET /api/balia-catalog/download returns 200 with Content-Type: application/pdf and Content-Disposition: attachment
